tweets.topic: Euphoria Season 3 Episode 2 Release Time (India): When Will Euphoria 3 NEW Ep Drop Online? Where To Stream?
tweets.tweet: Euphoria Season 3 Episode 2 drops on Max at 1:30 PM IST on Monday, with new episodes releasing weekly. If you've been refreshing your feed waiting for more Rue drama, at least the timing works for a lunch break watch. #EuphoriaSeason3 #MaxStreaming

tweets.topic: Jio Hotstar to bring HBO Max to India, expands partnership with Warner Bros. Discovery
tweets.tweet: Jio Hotstar is bringing HBO Max content to India through an expanded partnership with Warner Bros. Discovery, giving subscribers access to shows like Game of Thrones and The Last of Us.

tweets.topic: Stocks to Watch for April 20: HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Jio Financial, Trent, Yes Bank, Hyundai and more
tweets.tweet: HDFC Bank, ICICI Bank, Jio Financial, Trent, Yes Bank, and Hyundai are key stocks on the radar for April 20 trading. If you're keeping an eye on your portfolio, these movers might give you something interesting to track today. #StockMarket #IndianStocks

tweets.topic: Mukesh Ambani Net Worth, Biography, Business, Education, Financial Metrics, News
tweets.tweet: I'd be happy to help, but I need specific news about Mukesh Ambani or Reliance to write about. The topic you've shared seems like a general category rather than a specific news event.

tweets.topic: Srinagar Court Denies Protection To Cable Operator Against JioStar, Cites Suppression Of Piracy FIR,...
tweets.tweet: Srinagar High Court rejected a cable operator's plea against JioStar, citing suppression of a piracy FIR filed by Jio. Looks like the crackdown on illegal streaming is getting serious — cord-cutters might finally see some legit competition heat up. #StreamingWars #IndianTech

tweets.topic: JIO IPO DRHP expected in March: Reliance readies India’s largest public offer
tweets.tweet: Reliance is gearing up to file the DRHP for Jio's IPO in March, setting the stage for what could be India's biggest public offering ever. This could be a game-changer for retail investors wanting a piece of India's telecom and digital infrastructure story. #JioIPO #IndianTech

tweets.topic: Bharti Airtel leads gains as Sensex lifts ₹1,87,497.45 cr
tweets.tweet: Bharti Airtel's stock surged as the Sensex climbed to ₹1,87,497.45 crore, making it one of the top gainers today. Telecom stocks doing well usually means better investments and potentially more funds for network upgrades that could benefit us users. #BhartiAirtel #IndianMarkets

tweets.topic: Market recap: Eight of top 10 firms add Rs 1.87 lakh cr in mcap; Airtel biggest gainer
tweets.tweet: India's top 10 companies added a massive ₹1.87 lakh crore in market value this week, with Airtel leading the charge as the biggest gainer. Looks like our telecom and tech giants are having a solid run—good news if you've got these stocks in your portfolio! #IndianMarkets #Stoc...

tweets.topic: Top Firms Gain Rs 1.87 Lakh Cr; Airtel Leads
tweets.tweet: Airtel and other top Indian firms added ₹1.87 lakh crore in market value, with Airtel leading the charge in this bull run. Looks like Indian tech and telecom are finally getting their due respect from investors. #IndianTech #MarketGains

tweets.topic: Mcap of top 8 of 10 firms see value surge by ₹1.87 lakh crore; Airtel leads pack with ₹58,821 crore gain
tweets.tweet: India's top 8 companies just added ₹1.87 lakh crore in combined market value, with Airtel leading the charge with a ₹58,821 crore jump. Looks like the market's finally giving these giants the love they've been building toward. #IndianStocks #TechGains
